title: anthemis odontostephana var. tubicina
intro: Anthemis odontostephana var. tubicina, also known as tuberifera chrysanthemum, is a variant of Anthemis odontostephana, a plant species within the daisy family that is commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Anthemis odontostephana var. tubicina lie in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Anthemis odontostephana var. tubicina include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
